facts.title: India's Digital Public Infrastructure model adopted by multiple countries
facts.detail: Several nations are studying India's UPI, Aadhaar-style architecture, and digital payment governance as case studies for public service delivery.

facts.title: RBI maintains inflation-focused monetary stance
facts.detail: The central bank's policy communication continues to prioritize inflation management while supporting sustainable growth.

facts.title: ISRO expands collaboration in space-tech startups
facts.detail: Public-private partnerships in launch systems, satellites, and downstream services are increasing, boosting innovation.

facts.title: India's medal tally rises in global multi-sport events
facts.detail: Consistent investment in training ecosystems and grassroots infrastructure is reflected in improved international performance.

facts.title: New wetlands added to Ramsar list
facts.detail: Additional recognition under Ramsar boosts conservation priority and highlights India's biodiversity stewardship goals.

facts.title: Record use of renewable energy in national grid
facts.detail: Higher solar and wind integration milestones signal progress towards energy transition targets and climate commitments.

facts.title: Major government recruitment drives announced
facts.detail: Departments have announced large-scale hiring plans, increasing opportunities across central and state-level services.

facts.title: AI and cybersecurity feature in national policy discussions
facts.detail: Policy bodies are emphasizing secure AI adoption and cyber resilience in critical infrastructure and digital services.
